text.title: ICP Fit Scorecard Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to score the active book end-to-end and execute the resulting remove list.

step.name: gather-inputs
step.input: ICP persona doc, 90d activity CSV, MRR/LTV CSV, support-ticket CSV.
step.action: Consolidate inputs into a single per-customer workspace. Confirm coverage ≥ 95% of active customers.

step.name: score-five-signals
step.action: For each customer: score pain_match (0-25), budget_fit (0-20), urgency (0-15), product_fit (0-25), accessibility (0-15). Attach 1-sentence evidence per signal citing a specific artefact.
step.decision-gate: Any signal missing evidence → reject row per r3.

step.name: compute-total-and-band
step.action: Sum the 5 signals into total. Assign band: KEEP ≥70, NURTURE 40-69, REMOVE <40. Validate total math.
step.output: scored-rows.json with total + band per row.
step.decision-gate: total != sum of 5 signals → block (validator). Rule r1.

step.name: build-histogram
step.action: Count rows per band; compute median total; publish to internal log + build-update post per r6.

step.name: execute-remove-list
step.action: For each REMOVE row, schedule action: sunset_email / refund_offer / polite_no within 30 days. Use templates/sunset-email.md. Document exceptions with reviewer name + reason.
step.decision-gate: REMOVE row with no scheduled action → block. Rule r5.

step.name: schedule-quarterly-re-score
step.action: Set calendar reminder for scored_at + 90 days. Diff next quarter's scorecard for >15-point movers.
step.output: Calendar entry + diff plan for next run.
